tools.name: enrich_profile

tools.description: Enrich a LinkedIn company page → firmographics.

tools.name: enrich_profiles_bulk
tools.description: Bulk enrich up to 50 LinkedIn profiles in one call.

tools.name: enrich_companies_bulk
tools.description: Bulk enrich up to 50 LinkedIn companies by ID.

tools.name: people_search
tools.description: Search 700M+ indexed profiles by account/contact filters. Cheapest discovery option.

tools.description: Live LinkedIn profile search by name/title/company/school/location/industry.

tools.name: lead_search
tools.description: Advanced lead search — 30+ filters, inclusion/exclusion, sessionId pagination, Sales Nav URL.

tools.name: search_reference_data
tools.description: Reference catalog of valid labels for lead_search (seniority, industries, functions, companySize, profileLanguages).

tools.name: ad_search
tools.description: Search the LinkedIn Ad Library.

tools.name: ad_details
tools.description: Full ad details — creative variants, impression stats, targeting.

tools.name: post_keyword_search
tools.description: Search LinkedIn posts by keyword with date/content/author filters.

tools.name: profile_activities
tools.description: Recent posts / comments / reactions from a specific profile.

tools.name: post_details
tools.description: Full post content + reactions with reactor profiles.

tools.name: post_activities
tools.description: Paginated comments/reactions on a single post.

tools.name: find_emails
tools.description: Batch email finding — up to 100 people per job. Async — poll for completion.

tools.name: check_email_finding
tools.description: Poll status of a find_emails job. Free.

tools.name: verify_emails
tools.description: Batch email verification — up to 1000 emails per job. Async.

tools.name: check_email_verification
tools.description: Poll status of a verify_emails job. Free.

tools.name: email_finder
tools.description: Single-record email finding via multi-provider waterfall. Hard failures are not billed.

tools.name: phone_finder
tools.description: Single-record mobile phone finding via waterfall.

tools.name: email_verifier
tools.description: Single-record email deliverability verification via waterfall.

tools.name: person_enricher
tools.description: Enrich a person from their email via waterfall.

tools.name: company_enricher
tools.description: Enrich a company from its domain via waterfall.

tools.description: Structured data (JSON-LD) from any URL.

tools.name: web_pixels
tools.description: Tracking pixels / analytics tags on a page.

tools.name: web_scrape
tools.description: Full-page HTML + Markdown with anti-bot bypass.

tools.name: web_social_links
tools.description: Extract social profile links from any URL.

tools.name: web_tech_stack
tools.description: Detect 100+ technologies + GTM signals.

tools.name: web_emails
tools.description: Crawl a site and collect all emails.

tools.name: web_sitemap

tools.name: website_intelligence
tools.description: Flagship all-in-one site report (tech, pixels, emails, social, SSL).

tools.description: Google Trends time-series for a keyword.

tools.name: directory_yellowpages
tools.description: Yellow Pages directory search.

tools.description: Channel metadata.

tools.description: Channel video listing.

tools.description: Clean and validate a domain.

tools.name: predict_gender

tools.name: remove_whitespace
tools.description: Collapse whitespace.

tools.name: distribute_leads

tools.name: check_usage
tools.description: Check your credit balance + usage breakdown.

discover_people.ask: Do I need breadth or precision?

breadth_cheap.note: Indexed dataset. Fastest + cheapest for broad discovery.

precision_live.note: Live LinkedIn string match. Good for exact name/title/company hits.

targeted_complex.note: 30+ filters, include+exclude, sessionId pagination. Use when cheap tools can't express the ICP.

batch.note: Async batch. Use for 10+ people. Follow with check_email_finding.
Async, up to 1000. Follow with check_email_verification.
